hypothesis: If frozen pre-trained single-gas neural networks are used to produce features that, together with gas fractions, are processed by a GraphSAGE two-node graph model, then this architecture will more accurately predict 10-point radial etching rates for Ar/O2 mixtures and generalize better under Testgrid and Testthresh conditions than baseline feedforward, GCN, and GAT models because the frozen networks embed single-gas physics that improve mixture representation.
